Dialog.name: PFM_MAGICIAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Magician Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The High Priestess Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_LIMIT_UP1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By acquiring the Book of Samech, the number of Major Arcana cards obtainable from Shuffle Time has increased by one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_LIMIT_UP2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By acquiring the Book of Ayin, the number of Major Arcana cards obtainable from Shuffle Time has increased by one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_LIMIT_UP3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By acquiring the Book of Pe, the number of Major Arcana cards obtainable from Shuffle Time has increased by one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_LIMIT_UP4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By acquiring the Book of Tsadi, the number of Major Arcana cards obtainable from Shuffle Time has increased by one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_LIMIT_UP5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By acquiring the Book of Qof, the number of Major Arcana cards obtainable from Shuffle Time has increased by one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_LIMIT_UP6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By acquiring the Book of Resh, the number of Major Arcana cards obtainable from Shuffle Time has increased by one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_LIMIT_UP7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By acquiring the Book of Shin, the number of Major Arcana cards obtainable from Shuffle Time has increased by one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_LIMIT_UP8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By acquiring the Book of Tav, the number of Major Arcana cards obtainable from Shuffle Time has increased by one.[n]{f 1 1}
